metadata.seed: Dont know what to do Im just at a point of my life that i dont know what to do tried to get into 2 seperate relationships one ended up teling me she was lesbian and more recently one girl i was trying to get just friended me for no reason. I fell out of place at home my friends what me to talk but i cant when i trie to tell then i just break into tears. I just fell like im falling into an endles abiss

patient.query: Dont know what to do Im just at a point of my life that i dont know what to do tried to get into 2 seperate relationships one ended up teling me she was lesbian and more recently one girl i was trying to get just friended me for no reason. I fell out of place at home my friends what me to talk but i cant when i trie to tell then i just break into tears. I just fell like im falling into an endles abiss

llm_response.response:
It sounds like you're going through a challenging time right now, and it's completely normal to feel lost and overwhelmed. It's important to remember that everyone experiences ups and downs in life, and it's okay to take some time for self-reflection and healing.

Reaching out to friends can be helpful, even if you find it difficult at the moment. You might consider finding a trusted friend or family member who you feel comfortable talking to about your feelings. If you're not ready to talk yet, that's okay too. It's important to take care of yourself and prioritize your emotional well-being.

You may also find it helpful to seek out additional support, such as a therapist or counselor who can provide guidance and help you navigate through this difficult time. Remember, it's okay to ask for help when you need it. You are not alone, and there are people who care about you and want to see you thrive.
